changes.reason: Adds a distinct high-value AirPods ANC/transparency troubleshooting article supported by current Apple China Chinese official sources.

queries: AirPods 主动降噪 没有效果 通透模式 异常
AirPods Pro 降噪变弱 啸叫 反馈声 外部麦克风
AirPods 4 ANC 降噪不明显 自适应音频
AirPods Pro 入耳式贴合度测试 主动降噪
ANC transparency noise control AirPods Pro not working
canonicalReview.notes: Existing AirPods canonical articles cover one-side audio, firmware update, connection/reset, and charging. They mention noise control only as related context and do not cover ANC/transparency mode switching, external microphone obstruction, ear tip fit, adaptive audio, or transparency customization as the primary symptom cluster.
